query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'workshops' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3rBufSZ3uxLEBEp.f06ed5d6f482 --database RLqBMQr5dRLMySYrecFLe9 --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'workshops' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
